title: Relay M9 operational recovery
scope: Aggregate all Relay worker instances before evaluating fleet-wide capacity or failure rates.
Histogram queries require a Prometheus-compatible exporter that preserves Effect metric bucket names and attributes.

panels.title: Admission and in-memory pressure
panels.decision: Do not replay while admitted work or queues remain at capacity.

panels.title: Admission rejection rate
panels.decision: Sustained rejection means healthy work is already competing for bounded capacity.

panels.title: Attempt outcomes and decisions
panels.decision: Separate terminal success, scheduled retry, and exhausted work before choosing an operator action.

panels.title: Retry delay p95
panels.decision: Rising delay is backoff evidence; it is not proof that the receiver has recovered.

panels.title: Dead-letter creation
panels.decision: A continuing increase after repair or replay means the incident is not contained.

panels.title: Reconciliation health
panels.decision: Failed passes or growing claim lag indicate recovery discovery is unhealthy.

panels.title: Fencing rejections
panels.decision: A spike can reveal stale workers or lease loss; investigate before increasing replay volume.

panels.title: Dead-letter actions
panels.decision: Correlate each applied retry, repair, or termination with its incident record and delivery history.
